ChangeRequest.name: Integration of Party risk data information into the Party hierarchy
ChangeRequest.comment:
The entity `Party risk data` comprises the following attributes:
- `Default status` - `Date of default status` - `Performing status`
these attributes should be integrated into the `Party` hierarchy, i.e., it should be assessed on which subtype level these attribute may belong. Afterwards a model design should be drafted to-be-discussed within the group.
Please consider that:
- the `Date of default status` is only applicable to Parties with a `Default status`, i.e., for `Parties` that are `Not in default` such a date would not make sense. This situation will most likely require disjoint subtyping similar to `Organisations with / without legal proceedings`.
# Follow-up from the January '23 meeting @sdressler is currently working on the topic, he will provide the slides and a visio document.
**ECB** will organise a meeting to discuss the topic in detail when we tackle COREP.
